{{Quote|I guess I just remember the Clone Wars and how the 'hero' labels were handed out. You'd think a dozen Jedi and two dozen snubby jocks won the whole thing.|Afyon to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Rogue Squadron">''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''</ref>}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] ''' Afyon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[Eridain]]'', and later the escort frigate ''[[Larkhess]]'', which was eventually relegated to cargo transport duties in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
A native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], Afyon was a veteran of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He resented the amount of praise given to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] jocks, thinking it detracted from the sacrifices made by common [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] as himself. He later lobbied for Alderaanian demilitarization.

Afyon was off-planet when Alderaan was [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] and vowed to make the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] pay for its crimes. He signed up for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as a first officer on a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|Corellian gunship]], and worked his way up to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]]. He later captained ''Eridain'' during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

During the later [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he felt that [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] was being treated the same way the Jedi and [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] from the Clone Wars had been, with the same effect towards the other soldiers. During the [[Thrawn campaign]], Afyon was one of the few who saw [[Borsk Fey'lya]]'s support for the military for what it really was, a political bid for power.
